name: image_load_side_load_windows_defender
raw_query: any where (file.path:"*\\mpclient.dll" and (process.executable like~ ("*\\MpCmdRun.exe", "*\\NisSrv.exe"))) and (not (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Windows Defender\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Security Client\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Windows Defender\\*", "C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Platform\\*", "C:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*")))
